title: Christian Vecchiola's Contribution to Cloud Computing
description: A visual breakdown of Christian Vecchiola's primary research areas and their significance in the context of cloud computing.
elements: Core Technology: .NET-based Enterprise Grid & Cloud Computing Framework
Application Focus: High-Performance Computing (HPC) on Cloud Infrastructure
relationships: Vecchiola led the development of Aneka
Aneka implements the Market-Oriented Cloud (MOC) Architecture
The MOC Architecture enables resource leasing and trading
Aneka facilitates HPC and enterprise applications on cloud platforms
